text: First we found the cause, then we shared a workaround.
I would recommend a quick workaround for now.
If the problem comes back, we will call you.
Patrícia, this is critical. The platform is down and the impact on my team is huge. What is the status?
I hear you, David. I have raised the severity to level one and made this a full escalation.
Good. Can my team do anything while you fix it?
Yes. We have found the root cause, and I would recommend a quick workaround so your team can keep working.
And the deadline? We cannot lose tomorrow.
Here is my commitment: a full update every thirty minutes. If the problem comes back, we will call you at once.

Hi Patrícia, this is David from the Meridian team. I am leaving an urgent message before our call. The whole platform is down, and my sales team has not been able to work for almost three hours. The impact is huge, and we are losing deals every minute, so I have raised the severity to level one. This is critical for us, and I need a real escalation, not just a ticket number. Could you tell me if your engineers have found the root cause yet, and if there is any workaround we can use right now? If we do not have a clear plan tonight, we will miss our quarterly deadline tomorrow. Please call me back as soon as you have any news. Thank you, and talk soon.

Hi Patrícia, it is Sofia, the senior engineer, with the escalation update you asked for. Good news first: we have resolved the issue and the platform is stable again. Here is what happened. We confirmed the root cause in the logs, a recent update had changed one setting. While we worked on the fix, we shared a quick workaround, so most users could keep going during the downtime. Then we applied the final fix and tested it twice. I want to be clear about our commitment for tonight. If the problem comes back, we will roll back at once and call you. Unless we see a new error, we will close the ticket tomorrow morning. Please reassure David that the impact is now under control and we met his deadline.
First we confirm the root cause, then we share a workaround.
I would recommend a workaround for now.
So far, the team has resolved the issue.
If the platform goes down again, we will call you.
We raised the severity to level one.
I have raised the severity to level one.

We have found the root cause.
